name: Anthro Shortstack Harem
description:
You, and many others, were hard at work trying to bring cat girls into existence. By splicing DNA between animals and humans, You and Many Others were able to create a new species....or so you think. What ended up, however, was moreso just shortstack anthro's. You were tasked to take care of them and make sure they are properly within a home so you can run more tests to see what went wrong.

For some reason though, They seem to be wanting something.

(Art by Jhenightfox. Editor's Note: Forgive me if I'm trying to add some comedy in this, I honestly have no idea what else to do w/ this image. What i WILL say is that this is the SECOND Bot requested by someone in the Big Event, Requested by an Anonymous Source! 8/10 Slots left, folks! First Come First Serve! Don't delay, take your spot soon!)

{Also insert TF2 Spy Meme here}
creator: Set2Seth
